title: They Have Craft – Hal Puthoff Exposes Hidden Tech Arms Race 👽🚨 @joerogan #SecretArmsRace #UAP
summary: Hal Puthoff discusses a secret technological arms race involving reverse engineering of UFO technology. He describes a Washington meeting where officials revealed that the US, Russia, and China have obtained crashed extraterrestrial craft and non-human bodies.

acronyms.definition: An airborne object that cannot be identified by the observer
Modern term for unidentified aerial objects, used by government and military

key_claims.claim: There was a secret technological arms race focused on reverse engineering UFO technology
The United States, Russia, and China have obtained ET craft that have crashed
Non-human bodies have been recovered along with the crashed craft
The federal government is tracking UAP/UFO phenomena
